onboarding.title: Onboarding — complete a few basics to unlock your score
onboarding.body: The score appears once at least 5 signals are evaluable. Start with: phone number, address, map pin, logo, and at least one GMB attestation.

cronHealth.stale: Last weekly snapshot was {{days}} days ago — take a manual snapshot via Refresh.
cronHealth.notStarted: Weekly snapshots haven't started yet for this property. Take a manual snapshot via Refresh.

error.refreshRateLimitManager: You can refresh again in a minute — rate-limited to prevent runaway snapshots.
error.refreshRateLimitOwner: You can refresh once every 5 minutes. Try again shortly.
error.evidenceUrl: Evidence URL must point to the official Google Business or supported review platform.
error.unverifyLocked: Only the manager who verified this can unverify it.

attest.evidencePlaceholder: Optional evidence URL (Google Business / review platform)

expiry.expired: Verification has expired — re-verify to restore full credit.

gbp.title: Google Business Checklist
gbp.noDescription: No description set in property settings.

trendChart.title: Score history
trendChart.noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. The weekly cron writes the first one on Sunday 03:00 IST — or use the Refresh button to take one now.
trendChart.oneSnapshot: First snapshot taken — a second snapshot is needed to draw the trend line.

card.title: Visibility Score
card.stabilizing: Score stabilizes after the first 7 days of snapshots.

unverifyDialog.title: Unverify attestation
unverifyDialog.body: This will demote the signal back to Self-attested (50% credit). The owner who attested it will be notified via the audit log. Please share the reason — it stays in the audit trail.
unverifyDialog.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Evidence link no longer valid; GMB profile was unverified by Google.

reattestDialog.title: Replace manager verification?
reattestDialog.bodyWithDate: This signal is currently verified by a manager on {{date}}. Re-attesting will clear that verification and the credit will drop to 50% until a manager confirms the new evidence.
reattestDialog.bodyNoDate: This signal is currently verified by a manager. Re-attesting will clear that verification and the credit will drop to 50% until a manager confirms the new evidence.
